message:
refactor(e2e): improve fixture error handling and edge cases

Update E2EFixture with proper error handling and robustness fixes:

Error handling improvements:
- create_skill() now returns Result<()> instead of panicking
- create_skill_in_layer() now returns Result<()>
- Unknown layer lookup uses ok_or_else with MsError::ValidationFailed
- File operations propagate errors via ? operator
- Import MsError and Result from ms::error

This allows test code to use ? operator and provide better
diagnostics when fixture setup fails.

Edge case fix in truncate():
- Handle max_len < 3 case where we can't fit "..." suffix
- Returns repeated "." chars for very small limits
- Prevents panic from saturating_sub underflow in edge cases

Before:
  truncate("hello", 2)  // Could underflow or produce "..."

After:
  truncate("hello", 2)  // Returns ".."
  truncate("hello", 3)  // Returns "..."
  truncate("hello", 5)  // Returns "hello"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
